plain.en: God, our Father, who raised up in the Church of Africa many men and women outstanding in holiness; grant us, we beseech you, the gift of your grace, that we may follow their example in order to be, one day, their fellow citizens in heaven. Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son, who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit, one God, for ever and ever.

en.text: God, our Father,
who raised up in the Church of Africa
many men and women outstanding in holiness;
grant us, we beseech you, the gift of your grace,
that we may follow their example
in order to be, one day, their fellow citizens in heaven.
Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son,
who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit,
one God, for ever and ever.

plain.en: Father of love and mercy, receive our prayers and gifts on this feast of the Saints of Africa, may this celebration bring us closer to you, the source of life and holiness, and give us renewed vigour in living our baptismal call. Through Christ our Lord.

en.text: Father of love and mercy,
receive our prayers and gifts on this feast of the Saints of Africa,
may this celebration bring us closer to you,
the source of life and holiness,
and give us renewed vigour in living our baptismal call.
Through Christ our Lord.

plain.en: Father of life, who has nourished us at the table of the Word and of the Eucharist; strengthened by these gifts, and sustained by the example and prayer of the Saints of Africa, may we work for the spreading of your Kingdom in holiness and love. Through Christ our Lord.

en.text: Father of life,
who has nourished us
at the table of the Word and of the Eucharist;
strengthened by these gifts,
and sustained by the example and prayer of the Saints of Africa,
may we work for the spreading of your Kingdom
in holiness and love.
Through Christ our Lord.
